After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

HBO.East.us2.title: Superman II
HBO.East.us2.description: Superman (Christopher Reeve) foils the plot of terrorists by hurtling their nuclear device into outer space, but the bomb's shock waves free the Kryptonian villain General Zod (Terence Stamp) and his henchmen Ursa (Sarah Douglas) and Non (Jack O'Halloran) from their imprisonment. Traveling to Earth, they threaten the planet with destruction at the same time that Superman decides to renounce his superpowers in order to live a normal life as Clark Kent with his new love, Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: MacGruber
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Suicide Squad
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Songs for Raisa
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: After setting boundaries with her parents, Katie makes a decision about her marriage to Archie, who has his own talk with Sunny about the future; then, as he grapples with Katie's independence, Greg prepares to say goodbye to his semester.

Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.

Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bring Me the Beauties

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As Frederick prepares for a coming global cataclysm, model Jacki Adams joins Eternal Values and exposes the group's true nature.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Judy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander, also known as the AANHPI, communities in America.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Commandant's Shadow
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Hans Jürgen Höss, the 87-year-old son of Rudolf Höss, as he faces his father's terrible legacy for the first time. His father was the camp commandant of Auschwitz and masterminded the murder of over a million Jews. While Hans Jürgen Höss enjoyed a happy childhood playing with many toys in the family villa at Auschwitz, Jewish cellist Anita Lasker-Wallfisch was playing for her life to survive the notorious concentration camp.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Joker
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Donyale Luna: Supermodel

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Brutalist
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect arrives in America to rebuild his life. On his own in a strange new country, a wealthy industrialist recognizes his talent -- but power and legacy comes at a heavy cost.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Spectacular Now
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Complete Unknown
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Moment
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Enemy

Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune: Part Two
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: An Update on Our Family
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Welcome to Our Family
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chronicles the lucrative world of YouTube vlogging, including social media archival footage of Myka and James Stauffer; Hannah Cho, an avid YouTube consumer, explains how daily videos and constant updates provide a sense of community.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: An Update on Our Family
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Damn Good Mom
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The business of family vlogging is explored; as adoption day approaches, the Stauffers post videos counting down the days.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: An Update on Our Family
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Where's Huxley?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Concerned fans turn to critics; commentators shed light on the Stauffers' catalogue of content, dissecting their lavish lifestyle and their adopted son's treatment; an update from the family results in brands dropping their sponsorship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Green Lantern
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Sworn to preserve intergalactic order, the Green Lantern Corps has existed for centuries. Its newest recruit, Hal Jordan, is the first human to join the ranks. The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have thus far been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a gifted and cocky test pilot, may be the corps' only hope when a new enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Twilight
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Lighthouse

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie

Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Lobster

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Any One of Us

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Victor Frankenstein is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe, with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Frankenstein 1970
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Bride!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Miss You, Love You
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger, her estranged son's assistant.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dead of Winter
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Gran Turismo
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Capítulo 3 - Parabellum

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Real Women Have Curves

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Duna

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Duna: parte dos

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Marty Supreme

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Shape of Water
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Baltimore, década de 1960. Elisa, muda desde que era un bebé, trabaja como limpiadora nocturna en un centro de investigación aeroespacial. Una noche, mientras está limpiando en una zona de alta seguridad, ve cómo llevan al laboratorio una cápsula con un extraño ser en su interior. Se trata de un hombre anfibio, del que se enamora. A partir de entonces, Elisa elabora un plan para liberar al mutante.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Entre Nos Presents: Nick Guerra: Love Me at My Worst

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Christy

Impulsada por la determinación y el deseo de ganar, se adentra en el mundo del boxeo con la ayuda de su entrenador, mánager y esposo, Jim. Con una personalidad fogosa en el ring, sus batallas más duras comienzan fuera de él mientras se enfrenta a la familia, la identidad y una relación peligrosa.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Life of Pi
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Después de decidir vender su zoológico en la India y mudarse a Canadá, Santosh y Gita Patel viajan en un barco carguero con sus hijos y algunos animales. Una terrible tormenta hunde el barco, dejando a Pi, el hijo de los Patel, como el único sobreviviente humano. Sin embargo, Pi no está solo; un temible tigre de bengala lo acompaña en el bote salvavidas. Los días se vuelven semanas y meses, y Pi y el tigre deben aprender a confiar el uno en el otro para sobrevivir.

CBS.Sports.Network.HD.us2.title: Time to Schein
CBS.Sports.Network.HD.us2.description: Since talking sports during his undergrad days on the Syracuse University airwaves, Adam Schein's passionate, energetic, fan-friendly style has served him well, from the legendary WFAN in New York to a daily show on Sirius Radio. It's also prepared him for his dream job -- "Time to Schein," a national weekday series on CBS Sports Network. In a fast-moving, unscripted format, the host presents his unique perspective on the latest news and social media trends, provides bold predictions and interacts with key players, personalities and league personnel. Schein also hosts "That Other Pregame Show" and "NFL Monday QB" on CBS Sports Network during the NFL season.

Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Danny's problems, the lies create more trouble.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Devil Wears Prada
AMC.HD.us2.description: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Cast Away
AMC.HD.us2.description: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Mummy Returns
AMC.HD.us2.description: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

AMC.HD.us2.title: 50 First Dates
AMC.HD.us2.description: Playboy vet Henry sets his heart on romancing Lucy, but she has short-term memory loss. She can't remember anything that happened the day before. So every morning, Henry has to woo her again. Her friends and family are very protective and Henry must convince them that he's in it for love.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Mayfair Witches
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Michaelmas
AMC.HD.us2.description: Rowan, Moira, Cortland, and Lark search for Lasher in Scotland; Sip is questioned by the Talamasca.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Mayfair Witches
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: A Tangled Web
AMC.HD.us2.description: Rowan seeks Lasher, who joined the Scottish Mayfairs; Sip reluctantly assists the Talamasca.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Paid Programming
AMC.HD.us2.description: Paid programming.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
AMC.HD.us2.description: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Aging Brain
AMC.HD.us2.description: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Car Repair Secrets!
AMC.HD.us2.description: Save thousands on car repairs.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
AMC.HD.us2.description: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
AMC.HD.us2.description: Every 5 seconds there's a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert you, restore your identity, and reimburse lost funds—leading the way in protecting families every day.

AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Slippery Silks
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges are carpenters who inherit a fancy dress boutique; they put on a fashion show with dresses they've designed based on furniture; during the show, the boys break a Ming vase.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: They Stooge to Conga
AMC.HD.us2.description: The trio encounters Nazis; guest Lloyd Bridges.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Jumanji
AMC.HD.us2.description: A magical board game unleashes a world of adventure on siblings Peter and Judy Shepherd. While exploring an old mansion, the youngsters find a curious, jungle-themed game called Jumanji in the attic. When they start playing, they free Alan Parrish, who's been stuck in the game's inner world for decades. If they win Jumanji, the kids can free Alan for good, but that means braving giant bugs, ill-mannered monkeys and even stampeding rhinos!

AMC.HD.us2.title: Captain America: Civil War
AMC.HD.us2.description: Political pressure mounts to install a system of accountability when the actions of the Avengers lead to collateral damage. The new status quo deeply divides members of the team. Captain America (Chris Evans) believes superheroes should remain free to defend humanity without government interference. Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.) sharply disagrees and supports oversight. As the debate escalates into an all-out feud, Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and Hawkeye (Jeremy Renner) must pick a side.

Maximus is then relegated to fighting to the death in the gladiator arenas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dos bebés fueron cambiados al nacer en el hospital. Santiago y Andrés, ahora adolescentes, se enfrentan a una verdad que altera sus vidas y la de sus padres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Flor busca desesperadamente un trabajo para poder ayudar a su abuelita.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Blanca conoce a Jaime y a los pocos meses se mudan juntos, ella no sabe que él está involucrado en lavado de dinero y lo descubre demasiado tarde. Termina tras las rejas acusada de complicidad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Federico y Mónica pierden a su hijo Jorgito justo el día del nacimiento de Pablito. El padre, ante el dolor, se entrega a la bebida y abandona a su familia, pero los lazos de amor siempre pueden recuperarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Xóchitl huye de su casa por temor, está embarazada. Al nacer sus gemelos acepta venderlos, pero un accidente cambia las cosas y cuando ella se arrepiente de lo que hizo, intentan eliminarla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Kevin y Alfredo demandan al joyero por negarse a hacer los anillos. Elianny cuida al hermano de Ángel a cambio del pago de unos senos y glúteos nuevos, pero ahora no cumple el acuerdo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miriam encuentra a sus dos hijos menores amarrados tras ser amenazados con un arma para enviar mensajes al padre, quien mantiene una relación con una mujer casada y se niega a irse de la casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Parto montado; Promotoras de papel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: José y su pareja transexual, Michelle, adoptaron un bebé y fingieron un parto, sin imaginar que la ex de José publicaría todo. Mercedes y Sara fueron estafadas mientras repartían publicidad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nos quitó la vida; Venganza de la ex
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Quiere ser la guardiana del amigo de su hijo para llenar el espacio que él dejó al morir. Escapa para evitar ser descubierto y se lesiona, ahora no puede practicar su pasión: el paracaidismo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mínimo cien al día
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marina, con apenas ocho años, termina en manos de una pareja de explotadores de niños al escapar del abuso y maltrato de su propia familia. La intervención de una reportera cambia las cosas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niña sucia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Yolanda aparenta ser fría e indolente, pero su diario esconde la desgarradora experiencia que vivió al ser abusada sexualmente. Su amigo Saúl, al descubrir su secreto, la ayuda a recuperarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo J. Argentina inicia su participación frente a Argelia desde el Estadio Kansas City. La Albiceleste buscará extender su dominio histórico frente a selecciones africanas en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Al entregar una pizza en una unidad militar, James enfrenta un proceso de deportación por papeles falsos. La tarea escolar sobre el bullying causa burlas entre los niños y los padres reaccionan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La niña tarotista
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alejandro exige una orden de alejamiento para su suegra porque introdujo a su nieta de 6 años en el mundo del tarot. La niña atiende consultas y cobra, y la abuela asegura que tiene un don.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Secreto de hermanas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Patricio se casa con Rosa María porque está embarazada, sin saber que Delia también espera un hijo suyo. Con el tiempo, Edna y Mariana se convierten en amigas, aunque no tienen idea del lazo que las une.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Hoy en el Mundial
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un espacio dedicado a celebrar la máxima cita del fútbol con todo lo que sucede dentro y fuera de la cancha. Desde el color y el calor de los fans hasta las historias de vida más conmovedoras.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Vive el Mundial
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La cuenta regresiva al primer partido de cada día. Desde los estudios y desde los estadios se calienta cada jornada para conectar con todo el ambiente, la algarabía y sus historias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo K. Portugal se mide a RD del Congo desde el Estadio Houston. Los Lusos parten como favoritos ante una selección que regresa al escenario mundialista.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Secretos en la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Julia, marcada por la violencia de su padre, descarga su ira en Daniela, quien víctima de sus agresiones termina en el hospital, al igual que la madre de su agresora, abusada por su marido.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Enamorándonos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los conductores Carmen y Adrián compiten por una fundación para multiplicar los premios. A pesar de los esfuerzos de los conductores de Enamorándonos, llegan a la novena pregunta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Matías
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cristian tiene problemas para relacionarse, lo que afecta a vecinos y conocidos. Solo Matías, su perro, recibe su amor. Le quedan 24 horas para resolver la custodia del perro y un corazón roto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Arriesgó a su familia por ojo alegre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miriam encuentra a sus dos hijos menores amarrados tras ser amenazados con un arma para enviar mensajes al padre, quien mantiene una relación con una mujer casada y se niega a irse de la casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niño asesino; El yogurt de la discordia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un niño irrespetuoso y violento, es capaz de amenazar de muerte a su propia madre. Iveth prepara yogures con fluidos vaginales, Yailyn le da uno a su hija y la contagia de herpes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Como anillo al dedo; Sacada de sangre mortal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La boda entre Jenifer y su novio se cancela, pero ella se niega a devolver el anillo de compromiso. Teresa contrata a John como enfermero, una inyección demostró que él es un farsante.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No soy tu enemiga
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Silvia deja a su hija a cargo de la abuela, pero comete un error al buscar una nueva cuidadora, quien, junto a su novio, secuestra a la niña. Una denuncia a tiempo deja todo al descubierto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo K. Portugal se mide a RD del Congo desde el Estadio Houston. Los Lusos parten como favoritos ante una selección que regresa al escenario mundialista.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial lo mejor de 12 corazones: Shows de niños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de cabaret
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial bachelor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La tentación
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niña no hereda; El padrote
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El interés en una herencia ha motivado a Sandra a hacer lo imposible para que Wilmer no sea el beneficiado y de esta forma mantener a su hija como heredera. Melissa quiere recuperar a su hijo, que fue adoptado por Raúl, quien, junto a su esposa, ha cuidado al niño como parte de un negocio con el padre del chico, que es un capo que está en la cárcel y pronto saldrá a buscar al niño.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo L. Inglaterra y Croacia se enfrentan desde el Estadio Dallas. Los croatas eliminaron a los ingleses en las semifinales de Rusia 2018 rumbo a la histórica final.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un nuevo amanecer
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Eugenia está a punto de perder la vista, pero su familia no tiene recursos para una cirugía. Conoce a Daniel y el amor florece, pero una amenaza familiar pone en peligro la posibilidad de que estén juntos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Día de las Madres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Álvaro abandona su casa, le dice a Soledad que ya no la ama. Los hijos le reclaman a la madre lo sucedido y deciden irse también. Después de maltratarla, se ven obligados a pedir perdón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La vida empieza hoy
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura y Jaime quedan en la calle con un bebé a punto de nacer. Mientras tanto, don Julián se siente abandonado por sus hijos y cree que su vida ya no tiene sentido, hasta que sus vidas se cruzan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una semilla de fe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La madre de Marcela se empeña en separar a su hija de Javier, sin considerar el daño que les hace a su nieta y a toda la familia. La niña está a punto de quedarse sin primera comunión, pero no pierde la fe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Proyecciones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana sofoca a su hija Julia con normas estrictas y cuando la joven descubre el oscuro pasado de su madre, la enfrenta. Tras reflexionar, deciden retomar sus vidas sin prejuicios ni mentiras.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mayra: La verdadera libertad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Andrés intenta asesinar a sus hijos tras discutir con Mayra, su esposa, y por accidente termina muerto. Ella va a la cárcel acusada de asesinato, al salir de prisión demuestra su inocencia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Salvar vidas, salvar almas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Renée y su hermano Jonatan son paramédicos, ambos se toman muy en serio su trabajo, al punto de comprometerse hasta lograr que una joven víctima supere el círculo de violencia que la rodea.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Más vale correr a tiempo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Julio y Mauricio quieren ganar una cocina integral, pero no lo logran y se van en la fastidiosa quinta pregunta. Diana y Rafael quieren ganar la supercanasta, pero prefieren escaparse con sus premios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Papá con sorpresa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un padre transexual cambia su identidad y ahora se llama Gia. Para suavizar la noticia, se presenta ante su hijo como una tía amiga, pero el chico se enamora y crea un conflicto familiar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Pasión Mundial
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La celebración mundialista no se detiene. Se reúne todo lo que deja el duelo que acaba de finalizar y ofrece una mirada al próximo encuentro. Comentarios expertos, voces de jugadores y más.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 2 del Grupo A. México se enfrenta a República de Corea desde el Estadio Guadalajara. El Tri derrotó a los asiáticos por 2-1 en la fase de grupos de Rusia 2018, resultado que ayudó a los mexicanos a avanzar a octavos de final.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Todo el Mundial
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cada día del Mundial es una fábrica de historias. Golazos, frases inolvidables, curiosidades, polémicas... Lo más lindo, lo más llamativo y lo más divertido de la máxima cita del fútbol.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sexos cruzados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Clara le disputa a César la custodia de sus dos hijos, Camilo y Andrea, lo considera una mala influencia. Lo acusa de exponerlos en una campaña para menores transgénero producida por él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 2 del Grupo B. Canadá recibe a Catar desde BC Place Vancouver en un duelo entre dos selecciones anfitrionas de las últimas ediciones mundialistas. Ambos equipos buscan consolidar sus proyectos en la élite internacional.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: El Post Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras los partidos, toca el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza lo ocurrido sobre el terreno de juego en los encuentros del Mundial y aporta imágenes inéditas. Los protagonistas del encuentro también ofrecen su punto de vista.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Costa de Marfil-Ecuador
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Maradona: The Fall
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: En el Mundial de 1994, saltó el escándalo. Diego Maradona, icono del fútbol, dio positivo en un control antidoping y fue expulsado de la selección argentina. Este trabajo documental repasa el momento más duro en la carrera futbolística del astro de Lanús.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: Sierd de Vos is al vier decennia sportjournalist en al jaren de gelauwerde commentator van het Spaans voetbal. Speciaal voor de Ziggo Sport kijker is Sierd op zijn zolder gaan kijken en op zoek gegaan naar de mooiste pareltjes. In de komende anderhalf uur ziet u een bloemlezing uit al deze verhalen.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Alex Rins - Unstoppable
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.subtitle: Chapter 1
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: Een blessure kan niet alleen het einde van de carrière van een atleet betekenen, maar ook veel werk. Alex Rins doet verslag van verschillende levens - Het is een vierdelige documentaire waarin atleten worden geïnterviewd.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Alex Rins - Unstoppable
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.subtitle: Chapter 2
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: Alex is hard gevallen. Midden in Mugello valt hij en nu moet hij zich een weg terug naar het leven vechten. Hij droomt van het grote circuit, het gejuich en zijn oude carrière. Nu nadert de grote dag langzaamaan.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Alex Rins - Unstoppable
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.subtitle: Chapter 3
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: Alex is dolblij met zijn grote succes. Hij zit voor het eerst weer op zijn motor.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Alex Rins - Unstoppable
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.subtitle: Chapter 4
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: Alex heeft zich een weg terug in het leven gevochten. Na vier afleveringen en zijn machtige crash is hij nu weer terug aan de top. Hij zit op zijn motor en wil de bochten nemen. De grote Aziatische tour komt eraan.

Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.title: All Blacks In Their Own Words
Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.subtitle: Loyaliteit
Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.description: Na een teleurstellend einde van 2021 verwelkomden de All Blacks in juli het nummer één team ter wereld, Ierland, voor een reeks van drie tests. Het team werd op en naast het veld uitgedaagd, wat een ongekende verandering in het trainingskamp teweegbracht. Het team reisde af naar Zuid-Afrika om te vechten voor trots- en voor elkaar.

Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.title: All Blacks In Their Own Words
Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.subtitle: Het is tijd
Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.description: Ierland was 17 wedstrijden ongeslagen en de grote favoriet toen ze het in de kwartfinale van het WK tegen Nieuw-Zeeland moesten opnemen. Deze wedstrijd zou het All Blacks-team en hun WK-campagne van 2023 definiëren.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: KICK 't MET
Ziggo.Sport.nl.subtitle: Interview: Kenneth Taylor
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: Kenneth Taylor blikt openhartig terug op zijn overstap van zijn vertrouwde 'warm bad' bij Ajax naar Serie A-topclub Lazio Roma. Hij bespreekt de tactische cultuurschok in Italië, het uiteenvallen van zijn Amsterdamse vriendengroep en de waardevolle lessen die hij meekreeg van Francesco Farioli. Tot slot laat de ambitieuze middenvelder er geen misverstand over bestaan: een toekomstige terugkeer naar zijn grote liefde Ajax sluit hij absoluut niet uit.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: Het finale duel: Ronaldo vs Messi
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: In deze documentaire de twee genieën die voorbestemd waren om een tijdperk te bepalen, botsten op hetzelfde podium. Deze documentaire onderzoekt de oorsprong van de rivaliteit tussen Cristiano Ronaldo en Lionel Messi, het moment waarop hun confrontatie het Spaanse voetbal veranderde en grootsheid in het moderne voetbal voorgoed herdefinieerde.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: Frank Slotta maakt kennis met rugby: Schotland - Frankrijk in de Six Nations
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: Frank Slotta had nog nooit een rugbywedstrijd gezien: hoog tijd dus voor Jay-Jay Boske om hem mee te nemen! En niet zomaar een wedstrijd: in Schotland strijdt het thuisland tegen titelverdediger Frankrijk in de Six Nations. Wint Schotland? Dan ligt alles open voor de laatste speelronde, met nog 3 titelkandidaten. Wint Frankrijk? Dan kan het de titel prolongeren… Slotta laat zich onderdompelen in alles wat rugby zo'n mooie, unieke sport maakt.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Freedom 250: Topuria vs. Gaethje - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: On Sunday, June 15, the Octagon comes to Washington, D.C. as UFC Freedom 250 brings a star-studded lineup to The White House. In the main event, undefeated lightweight champion Ilia “El Matador” Topuria faces off with interim titleholder Justin “The Highlight” Gaethje to determine who is the undisputed best in the 155-pound weight class. In the co-main event, former middleweight and light heavyweight champion Alex “Poatan” Pereira looks to become the first fighter to hold UFC gold in three weight classes as he squares off with Ciryl “Bon Gamin” Gane in a clash for the interim UFC heavyweight title.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT - LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Barcelona club captain and Spanish national team legend Gerard Pique has called time on his career. This is a whirlwind look back at the illustrious career of a man who has won everything the game has to offer.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Muhammad vs. Bonfim - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The opening event of June is set to close with a critical matchup in the welterweight division as former champion Belal “Remember the Name” Muhammad faces off with Gabriel “Marretinha” Bonfim on Sunday, June 7 at Meta APEX in Las Vegas, Nevada. Muhammad put together an 11-fight unbeaten streak to claim the welterweight title at UFC 304, toppling Leon Edwards and aims to cement his standing amongst the division's best by turning back the ascending Brazilian.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT - LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - SEMI-FINALS 1 - MALAYSIA vs INDONESIA - (TEAM)
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation's historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 321: Aspinall vs. Gane
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The UFC heavyweight world championship is on the line in Abu Dhabi as Tom Aspinall defends his undisputed crown for the first time against Ciryl Gane. Plus Mackenzie Dern battles Virna Jandiroba for the vacant Women's strawweight belt and much more on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 5
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 12
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1004: Teixeira vs. Prochazka
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 275 featured Czech MMA star Jiri Prochazka in his third Octagon outing as he sought UFC gold against newly minted light heavyweight champion, Glover Teixeira. Relive their fight with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 321: Aspinall vs. Gane
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The UFC heavyweight world championship is on the line in Abu Dhabi as Tom Aspinall defends his undisputed crown for the first time against Ciryl Gane. Plus Mackenzie Dern battles Virna Jandiroba for the vacant Women's strawweight belt and much more on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Ultimate Knockouts - 1103: International Fighters
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Ultimate Knockouts features explosive KOs from international fighters, showcasing stars from Russia, England, and South Africa like Dricus du Plessis, Paddy Pimblett, Ilia Topuria, and more.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 313: Pereira vs Ankalaev
